counterfactualPolicyDiagnostics.metricNote: Counterfactual lift is measured at the same checkpoint against the stored no-action replay. Positive values always mean the recommended action beat no-action. Teacher-facing efficacy claims are suppressed below the replay support threshold.

realizedPathDiagnostics.metricNote: Realized-path improvements compare the current checkpoint to later checkpoints on the carried simulated action path. Positive values mean risk fell later. For pre-see-rescue, semester-close improvement is the primary realized outcome; stable recovery is not the primary acceptance target.

queueBurdenSummary.metricNote: Queue burden acceptance uses per-run stage statistics. Open queue counts reflect actionable items only; watching rows remain visible but do not block progression. Cross-run union counts are retained only as a diagnostic view.
